contentBlocks.original:
सरस्वति नमस्तुभ्यं वरदे कामरूपिणि
विद्यारम्भं करिष्यामि सिद्धिर्भवतु मे सदा
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sarasvati namastubhyaṃ varade kāmarūpiṇi
vidyārambhaṃ kariṣyāmi siddhirbhavatu me sadā
contentBlocks.translation: O Sarasvatī, I bow to you, the giver of boons, who fulfills desires. I am beginning my pursuit of knowledge. May success always be mine.
contentBlocks.meanings: सरस्वति (sarasvati) – O Sarasvatī; नमः (namaḥ) – bow; तुभ्यम् (tubhyam) – to you; वरदे (varade) – giver of boons; कामरूपिणि (kāmarūpiṇi) – who fulfills desires; विद्यारम्भं (vidyārambhaṃ) – beginning of knowledge (vidyā:knowledge | ārambhaṃ:beginning); करिष्यामि (kariṣyāmi) – I am beginning; सिद्धिः (siddhiḥ) – success; भवतु (bhavatu) – may be; मे (me) – mine; सदा (sadā) – always;
